content: Comparative performance benchmarks of ICM, RND, and pure curious agents from Topic A can be repurposed as a standardized stress test for 2025-configurable ICM-powered autonomous agents, revealing how configurable ICM curiosity depth trades off against task reward collection in open-ended environments. This creates a built-in validation pipeline for new configurable ICM designs that avoids overfitting to narrow extrinsic reward tasks.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
